channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 10.5%.

item.title: BBC Politics: Badenoch accuses Starmer of giving up on welfare reform
item.description: Badenoch accuses Starmer of giving up on welfare reform

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Farage exploiting Nowak’s murder against wishes of his family, says Starmer – UK politics live
item.description: Farage exploiting Nowak’s murder against wishes of his family, says Starmer – UK politics live

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer condemns riots in Southampton after Henry Nowak murder - The Guardian
item.description: Keir Starmer condemns riots in Southampton after Henry Nowak murder - The Guardian

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Henry Nowak latest: Starmer hits out at Farage’s ‘unforgivable’ response to murder - ‘It shows exactly who he is’
item.description: Henry Nowak latest: Starmer hits out at Farage’s ‘unforgivable’ response to murder - ‘It shows exactly who he is’

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Labour split as minister criticises party’s attempts to reform welfare
item.description: Labour split as minister criticises party’s attempts to reform welfare

item.title: ITVX: Starmer condemns 'disgraceful' violent protests over Henry Nowak murder - ITVX
item.description: Starmer condemns 'disgraceful' violent protests over Henry Nowak murder - ITVX

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer reads out powerful plea from Henry Nowak’s family in call for unity after violent clashes
item.description: Starmer reads out powerful plea from Henry Nowak’s family in call for unity after violent clashes

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Andy Burnham cancels call with hedge funds over ‘bond market pressure’ at short notice
item.description: Andy Burnham cancels call with hedge funds over ‘bond market pressure’ at short notice

item.title: BBC Politics: Scottish Secretary did not declare meeting with Mandelson's firm
item.description: Scottish Secretary did not declare meeting with Mandelson's firm

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Watch live: Starmer grilled at PMQs after violent clashes over Henry Nowak death
item.description: Watch live: Starmer grilled at PMQs after violent clashes over Henry Nowak death
